info.title: Aero API
info.description: Aero Workflow practice management REST API for managing appointments, emails, tasks, companies, contacts, projects, and more.

post.summary: Creates an Aero based on the Aero Template with the Id provided

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Id of the Aero Template you wish to base the created Aero on

404.description: Aero Template with the specified Id not found
